appraisal_events.evidence: « Les oreilles ont dû vous tinter, monsieur… On ne parlait que de vous » (à propos du voyage avec Mme Verdurin).
appraisal_events.explanation: Mme Cottard tries to place Swann in a valued social space by claiming he was the central subject of conversation in Mme Verdurin’s circle, implicitly conferring importance and inclusion.

status_effects.explanation: Being told he was the focus of talk at Mme Verdurin’s signals local inclusion/attention within that social milieu, even if the exact tone of the talk is unstated.
